title: ORA Lists
description: Configuration for entity and collection list views, including list options, visible properties, sorting, filtering, and optional client-side value maps.

bindingPath.description: RAMEN path used for list display, sorting, or filtering. This is intentionally a path string rather than a full binding object to avoid expensive server-side value expansion for list queries.

sortDirection.description: Default direction used by a sort option group.

listIndexName.description: Name of the configured list index used for grouping, filtering, sorting, or navigating this list option. The value should reference a key from index.config.json.

stringMap.description: Client-side map replacing raw list values with display labels.

property.description: Property displayed for each list result.

name.description: Path of the property to display for each result item.

display.description: Optional display template. The placeholder {{ value }} is replaced with the raw or mapped value.

valueMap.description: Optional client-side map replacing raw property values with display labels.

filterOption.description: Filter available for a list option.

icon.description: Optional icon class shown with the filter.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for the filter.

value.description: Path used as the filter field.

valueMap.description: Optional client-side map replacing raw filter values with display labels.

sortOption.description: Sort option available for a list option.

icon.description: Optional icon class shown with the sort option.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for the sort option.

value.description: Path used as the sort field.

sortOptionGroup.description: Configured sort options and their default direction.

initial.description: Value of the sort option selected by default.

direction.description: Default direction applied to the selected sort option.

icon.description: Optional icon class shown with the list option.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for the list option.

value.description: Internal value identifying this list option.

properties.description: Properties displayed for results in this list option.

sort.description: Sort options available for this list option.

filters.description: Filters available for this list option.

icon.description: Optional icon class shown with the entity option.

label.description: Static label or translation key shown for the entity option.

value.description: Internal value identifying this entity option.

properties.description: Properties displayed for results in this entity option.

index.description: Optional configured list index used for this entity option. References a key from index.config.json.

initial.description: Value of the entity option selected by default.

properties.description: Default properties displayed for entity results unless overridden by an option.

initial.description: Value of the collection option selected by default.

properties.description: Default properties displayed for collection results unless overridden by an option.
